transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] cheryl is a 34-year-old female with a past medical history significant for hypertension , who presents today with back pain .
- [Findings] and then in terms of your blood pressure , how are you doing ?
- [Findings] i want to do a quick physical exam on you .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the vital signs . so good- you know , here in the office , your vital signs look great . your blood pressure's really well controlled , which is good .
- [Findings] so on physical examination , you know , everything looks good . you know , on your heart exam , i do hear that slight two out of six systolic ejection murmur , but you've had that before . on your back exam , you do have some pain to palpation on the right lateral aspect of your lumbar spine , and you do have pain with flexion and extension as well , and you have a negative straight leg raise .
- [Findings] we did an x-ray before you saw me , so let's look at that . hey , dragon , show me the back x-ray . so looking here at this x-ray of the lumbar spine , everything looks good . there's no obvious fracture , you know , which is not surprising based on your history .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the labs . and your labs that we did before you came in all look great . there's no signs of infection .
- [Findings] and then , uh , let me know if you notice any increases in your blood pressure readings .
- [History of Present Illness] so i know the nurse told you a little bit about dax .
- [History of Present Illness] so you felt like , maybe like a spasm or something like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] and what have you taken for the pain ? i've been taking ibuprofen .
- [History of Present Illness] um , and did you have any trauma before that happened ?
- [History of Present Illness] and any numbing or tingling in your legs or your feet ?
- [History of Present Illness] any weakness in your lower extremities ?
- [History of Present Illness] and you're taking the lisinopril ?
- [History of Present Illness] so i know you did a review of systems sheet with the nurse , and i know you endorse , you know , this back pain . um , do you have any other symptoms ? fever , chills , congestion , cough , chest pain , shortness of breath ? i have a little bit of nasal congestion , but that's just from my seasonal allergies .
- [History of Present Illness] there's no elevated white blood cell count .
- [History of Present Illness] so for your first problem , this back pain , i think you have a lumbar strain , and , you know , that might've happened , you know , lifting something or exercising .
- [History of Present Illness] and for your last problem , your high blood pressure , again , everything looks great here .
- [History of Present Illness] do you need a refill of the lisinopril ?
- [Plan] and so what i want to do is prescribe meloxicam , 15 milligrams once a day . um , you know , i'm going to refer you to physical therapy just to do some strengthening exercises of your back , um , because i do want you to continue to be able to work out and exercise .
- [Plan] i want you to continue on the lisinopril , 10 milligrams a day .
- [Plan] order lisinopril 10 milligrams po daily .
